seoTitle: Wollongbar vs Wollongong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wollongbar and Wollongong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wollongbar and Wollongong.
heading: Wollongbar vs Wollongong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wollongbar, New South Wales and Wollongong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wollongbar has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Wollongong (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wollongbar or Wollongong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wollongbar has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Wollongong scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wollongbar scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Wollongong scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wollongbar or Wollongong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wollongbar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
